articles.title: CBI arrests human trafficking ‘kingpin’ in Myanmar-based cyber scam compounds case
articles.description: The accused has been identified as Sunil Nellathu Ramakrishnan, alias Krish, a resident of Mumbai. During the CBI probe, he emerged as one of the main “facilitators” in the trafficking network, through which victims were being illegally transported for exploitation in the scam centres in Southeast Asia.

articles.title: Datanomics: Jal Jeevan Mission connections rise, supply remains hurdle - Business Standard
articles.description: Datanomics: Jal Jeevan Mission connections rise, supply remains hurdle  Business Standard

topStories.title: From backing National Guard role to Powell ‘attack’: Key takeaways from Trump’s cabinet meeting
topStories.description: The remarks come as Trump faces legal challenges, economic pressures from rising energy prices, and political battles over immigration and federal authority, underscoring a combative tone ahead of key political contests.

topStories.title: Bulldozer Action In 5 Lakh Bighas: Himanta Sarma's Big Assam Poll Promise
topStories.description: Targeting the Congress party's vision of "Bor Axom" (Greater Assam), Himanta Biswa Sarma launched a strong ideological attack on Assam Pradesh Congress Committee president Gaurav Gogoi.

topStories.title: Quote of the Day by Naval Ravikant: ‘Play long-term games with long-term people’
topStories.description: Modern philosopher and entrepreneur Naval Ravikant's insights challenge us to rethink how we approach wealth, happiness, and personal growth.

topStories.description: Transgender athletes banned from women's Olympic events by new IOC policy aiming for 'fairness, safety and integrity'.

topStories.title: Trump reveals Iran's ‘gift’, says Tehran let 10 oil tankers pass through Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: Speaking during a Cabinet meeting at the White House, Trump said Tehran permitted 10 oil tankers to transit the critical shipping lane.

topStories.title: Trump says Iran ‘lousy fighters but great negotiators’
topStories.description: President Trump has said Iran is “begging to make a deal”, describing them as “lousy fighters but great negotiators".

topStories.title: Venezuela's Nicolas Maduro, wife produced in New York court in drug trafficking case, months after capture by US
topStories.description: Nicolas Maduro, the former President of Venezuela, on Thursday (local time), headed into a New York courtroom as he seeks to have his drug trafficking indictment dismissed, AP reported.

topStories.description: Pak not neutral Trump will listen to Modi US war expert pitches India as mediator

topStories.title: Iran-US war impacted ‘fertilisers, steel and aluminum’ the most, says Saudi Arabia Finance Minister
topStories.description: Saudi Arabia’s Finance Minister Al-Jadaan said that while oil has dominated media coverage, it is refined products – including fertilisers, steel and aluminum – that have been most affected due to the ongoing war.

topStories.title: Pakistan says it is mediating US-Iran talks
topStories.description: Pakistan says it is mediating indirect talks between the US and Iran aimed at ending the war.

dailyNews.title: From DKS to ‘Samrat Ashoka’, Karnataka MLAs dissolve party lines to seek free IPL tickets: ‘We are VIPs’
dailyNews.description: BJP leader raises issue in House; Congress MLA explains why KSCA must give special treatment to MLAs, demands five tickets each; speaker says four could do.

dailyNews.title: What's happening with Iran-US 'talks'?
dailyNews.description: Diplomatic efforts to end the war in Iran are accelerating. Proposals are being exchanged through Pakistan, though Iran denies direct talks with the US. Iran's demands include an end to aggression and financial compensation. The US seeks Iran's nuclear disarmament and missile program limits. Both sides need to claim victory for a deal. The conflict's outcome remains uncertain.

dailyNews.title: Trump urges GOP to end filibuster amid DHS shutdown, TSA staffing crisis, targets Chuck Schumer
dailyNews.description: In a strongly worded message on social media, Trump pressed lawmakers to eliminate the Senate filibuster rule, which requires 60 votes to advance legislation.

dailyNews.title: Jimmy Kimmel’s ‘plumber’ remark on US security chief triggers outrage: ‘Not a great look’
dailyNews.description: US late-night host Jimmy Kimmel is facing criticism online after mocking the country’s new Homeland Security chief as a “plumber” during his show, with many calling the remark elitist and dismissive of working-class professions.

dailyNews.title: Trump to hold cabinet meeting today amid DHS shutdown pressure and Iran war
dailyNews.description: The Cabinet forum is scheduled to begin at 10 a.m. EDT, with Trump expected to discuss both domestic operational challenges and foreign policy priorities amid the continuing DHS funding deadlock.

dailyNews.title: US tightens social media vetting — how your posts, likes may impact H-1B, K-3, G-5 visa applications
dailyNews.description: The US expanded its social media screening and vetting process to include more visa categories including G-5, H-3, H-4 dependents of H-3, K-1, K-2, K-3, Q, R-1, R-2, S, T, and U.

dailyNews.title: After Wooing Trump With Deals, Pakistan Gets a Seat at the Table
dailyNews.description: Steve Witkoff, a diplomatic envoy, used the Board of Peace to announce an agreement that could raze a Pakistan-owned Manhattan hotel. Now the country is involved in negotiating peace talks with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Mortgage Rates Jump Again as Iran War Effects Ripple Through Housing Market
dailyNews.description: The average rate on a 30-year mortgage in the United States hit 6.38 percent, the fourth increase since the war began.

dailyNews.title: European Allies Worry Russia Is Preparing to Deliver Drones to Iran
dailyNews.description: The drones are an improved version of a weapon that Iran sent to Russia for use in its war in Ukraine.

dailyNews.title: Trump Eyes White House Treaty Room for Latest Renovation Project
dailyNews.description: President Trump is making new plans in one of the most significant renovations in the history of the White House.

dailyNews.title: Four Problems for Trump in Birthright Citizenship Case
dailyNews.description: The president must confront a 1952 federal law, the possibility that millions will lose their citizenships, stateless foundlings and a fluid future.

dailyNews.title: ‘Lethality’ Used to Be a Pentagon Buzzword. Now It’s a Worldview.
dailyNews.description: It’s blunt instead of vague, brash instead of evasive, bold instead of cautious. And yet the word obfuscates as much as old defense jargon.

dailyNews.title: Wealthy Investors Target Foes of Clean Energy, Seeking Revenge
dailyNews.description: Renewable energy leaders said their industry got “rolled” in President Trump’s tax bill. Now they’re fighting back, starting in Texas.

dailyNews.title: Trump reveals ‘present’ from Iran as tankers move through Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Trump claims oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz signal real talks, as Steve Witkoff reports positive signs in U.S.-Iran backchannel negotiations.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth defends Trump Iran strikes, demands media ‘get it right’
dailyNews.description: War Secretary Pete Hegseth said U.S. operations against Iran have targeted military infrastructure and naval assets, describing the campaign as focused on defined objectives, during a Cabinet meeting.

dailyNews.title: Trump pressures GOP to scrap filibuster, says 'desperate' Schumer 'will make a deal'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump is pressuring the Senate GOP to scrap the filibuster in order to ram their priorities through the legislative chamber.

dailyNews.title: Watchdog warns legal powerhouse has made far-left advocacy their 'dominant focus' over the last decade
dailyNews.description: Trump-aligned watchdog group, America First Legal, says a decade of American Bar Association amicus briefs shows the powerful legal group pushed liberal outcomes 80% of the time it weighed in.

dailyNews.title: Zelenskyy claims US tied Ukraine security guarantees to giving up Donbas, White House denies
dailyNews.description: Zelenskyy claimed U.S. security guarantees for Ukraine are tied to ceding Donbas to Russia, but the White House says those claims are false.

dailyNews.title: Witkoff says U.S. presented Iran with 15-point plan for potential peace proposal
dailyNews.description: President Trump warned Iran to make a deal on his terms "before it is too late."

dailyNews.title: Trump slams Starmer's reaction to Iran war and questions U.K. alliance
dailyNews.description: During a Cabinet meeting at the White House, President Trump reacted to British Prime Minister Keir Starmer's reluctance to get involved in the Iran war. This comes as Mr. Trump says Iran is seeking an end to the conflict.

dailyNews.title: Trump reveals Iran apparently gifted the U.S. boats of oil that moved through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Iran gifted the U.S. multiple boats of oil that were moved through the Strait of Hormuz. Mr. Trump made the comments during a Cabinet meeting after saying the gifts were proof that the regime was looking to negotiate an end to the war.

dailyNews.title: Steve Witkoff says U.S. presented 15-point plan to end Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump's adviser Steve Witkoff spoke at a Cabinet meeting on Thursday and confirmed that the U.S. presented Iran with a 15-point action plan for peace through Pakistani mediators.

dailyNews.title: Trump holds first Cabinet meeting since Iran war sparked
dailyNews.description: President Trump is commenting on the Iran war at the first Cabinet meeting since the conflict in the Middle East began. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi reports.

dailyNews.title: H. R. McMaster breaks down Trump's rhetoric on Iran war
dailyNews.description: CBS News contributor H. R. McMaster, President Trump's national security adviser during his first presidential term, joins with more details on what may come next for President Trump and the military operations in the Middle East.
